title: theodore the cat totem
description: A cute cat drawing my little brother made that I've added as the totem of undying texture.
body:
I was chilling with my brother when he drew a funny looking cat on his desk, so I thought as he's gonna get Minecraft Java soon for the first time I'd make him a custom totem. Here I'm releasing it for anyone to use, so here you go!

ok ok the pack used to be called "little brother cat totem" but he told me his name is theodore so there you go. his name is theodore
